THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CARMI JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM COOPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. HONORABLE MAXWELL PRITT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF NAMED THE WRONG DEFENDANT IS THIS CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MAXWELL PRITT; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
